ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "us_size" INTEGER /* US size equivalent */,
  "chest" REAL /* Chest measurement in inches */,
  "length" REAL /* Length measurement in inches */,
  "shoulder_width" REAL /* Shoulder width measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement in inches */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of size (e.g., regular, petite, plus) */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart that this size belongs to */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, cm) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "size_chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the size chart (e.g., women's tops, men's pants) */,
  "clothing_type" TEXT /* Type of clothing that this size chart applies to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the size chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand that produced the item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size associated with the item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of clothing item (e.g., top, bottom, dress, outerwear) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the clothing item */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the clothing item (e.g., cotton, polyester) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the clothing item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the clothing item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the brand */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "preferred_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred size for the customer */,
  "preferred_brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred brand for the customer */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the customer in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the customer in pounds */,
  "body_type" TEXT /* Body type of the customer (e.g., slim, athletic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_preferred_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_preferred_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer receiving the recommendation */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item being recommended */,
  "recommended_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended size for the customer */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the recommendation (between 0 and 1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_recommended_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date of the order */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that this item belongs to */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item in the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the item (between 1 and 5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., administrator, brand manager, customer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being assigned a role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role being assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
